LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PAUL F. UTRECHT AND ZACKS & UTECHT, P.C. F/K/A ZACKS, UTRECHT & LEADBETTER, P.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD IS NOT HEARSAY AND IS PROPERLY REVIEWED BY THE COURT IN DETERMING WHETHER PLAINTIFF WOULD HAVE PREVAILED IN THE UDERLYING ACTION. FURTHER BRIEFING IS REQUESTED ON TWO ISUUES: 1) WHETHER THE PETITION WAS PREMATURE UNDER PUBLIC RESOURCES CODE 21167; AND 2) WHETHER PLAINTIFF WOULD HAVE PREVAILED IN THE UNDERLYING ACTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS. HEARING CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 2. FURTHER OPPOSITION TO BE FILED AND PERSONALLY SERVED BY NOVEMBER 17. FURTHER REPLY FILED AND PERSONALLY SERVED BY NOVEMBER 29. COURTESY COPIES WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797. (302)

Off Calendar Dec-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS PAUL F. UTRECHT and ZACKS & UTRECHT, P.C. f/k/a ZACKS, UTRECHT & LEADBETTER, P.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Peter R. Chernik, Esq. of 387-7500 for pltf & opposing party; David W. Evans, Esq. & Stephen J. Squillario, Esq. of Haight Brown & Bonesteel LLP 546-7500 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. See minutes for complete details of ruling. Order & judgment signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: ANN MENDOZA, CSR #6812

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS PAUL F. UTRECHT AND ZACKS & UTECHT, P.C. f/k/a ZACKS, UTRECHT & LEADBETTER, P.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD IS NOT HEARSAY AND IS PROPERLY REVIEWED BY THE COURT IN DETERMING WHETHER PLAINTIFF WOULD HAVE PREVAILED IN THE UDERLYING ACTION. FURTHER BRIEFING IS REQUESTED ON TWO ISUUES: 1) WHETHER THE PETITION WAS PREMATURE UNDER PUBLIC RESOURCES CODE 21167; AND 2) WHETHER PLAINTIFF WOULD HAVE PREVAILED IN THE UNDERLYING ACTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS. HEARING CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 2. FURTHER OPPOSITION TO BE FILED AND PERSONALLY SERVED BY NOVEMBER 17. FURTHER REPLY FILED AND PERSONALLY SERVED BY NOVEMBER 29. COURTESY COPIES WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Continued To Dec-29-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Motion And Otion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogaoptries;
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Paul Utrecht and Zacks & Utrecht, P.C.s' Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories.
There being no opposition, the motion s is granted:
1. All objections are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete, and verified response to defendants' request for production of documents (set one), form interrogatories (set one), and special interrogatories (set one) within ten days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2009 Set For Trial On Jun-21-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-02-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 505
